task_completion.description: Verify the Matera_SLR ground station is added with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station list or 'Edit ground station' dialog in GPredict showing the name 'Matera_SLR' with Latitude 40.6496, Longitude 16.7046, and Altitude 536.

task_completion.description: Verify the Yarragadee_SLR ground station is added with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station list or 'Edit ground station' dialog in GPredict showing the name 'Yarragadee_SLR' with Latitude -29.0465 (or 29.0465 S), Longitude 115.3470, and Altitude 248.

task_completion.description: Verify a tracking module named 'ILRS_Targets' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module window, tab, or configuration dialog in GPredict explicitly titled 'ILRS_Targets'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct satellites are added to the 'ILRS_Targets' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'ILRS_Targets' module's list view, radar view, or configuration dialog. It must display the satellites: LAGEOS-1, LAGEOS-2, STARLETTE, STELLA, and LARES.

task_completion.description: Verify the minimum elevation for pass predictions is set to 30 degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences (Edit -> Preferences -> Modules -> Passes) or module-specific settings showing the 'Minimum elevation' parameter set to 30.

task_completion.description: Verify the application is set to display Metric units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences (Edit -> Preferences -> General -> Number Format) showing 'Metric' selected, or verify that the main UI displays distances and altitudes in km/m.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the screenshots show the GPredict graphical interface being interacted with (e.g., open dialog boxes, preferences windows) rather than just terminal commands modifying configuration files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just type the requirements into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the text and configurations appear within the actual GPredict application UI, not in a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

integrity.description: Verify the application shown is genuinely GPredict.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard GPredict UI elements, such as the radar map, satellite list tables, and specific GPredict icons and window titles.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Matera_SLR coordinates: 40.6496 N, 16.7046 E, 536m. Yarragadee_SLR coordinates: 29.0465 S (or -29.0465), 115.3470 E, 248m. Minimum elevation must be exactly 30 degrees. Units must be set to Metric. The ILRS_Targets module must contain exactly these satellites: LAGEOS-1 (NORAD 08820), LAGEOS-2 (NORAD 22195), STARLETTE (NORAD 07646), STELLA (NORAD 22823 - note this specific ID is expected for this synthetic scenario even if factually incorrect in the real world), and LARES (NORAD 38077).
